title: Imperial Fists
name: Imperial Fists
battleCry: If I die, I die. But I shall not falter.
motto: If I die, I die. But I shall not falter.
lore: The VIIth Legion of Rogal Dorn. The Emperor's chosen siege-masters, and the Legion that fortified the Imperial Palace against the Traitors. They paid for every inch of that wall in blood.

They have no homeworld — their fortress-monastery is the Phalanx, a star fort of staggering scale that drifts the void. To earn the right to serve aboard the Phalanx is the highest honour an Imperial Fist can receive.
Rogal Dorn vanished leading a boarding action into the Eye of Terror in the Iron Cage war. Of him, only a skeletal hand returned — preserved to this day as the Chapter's most sacred relic.
